concept: Would you craft a survival game where the player must balance maintaining their body temperature in a world of extreme temperature fluctuations? Day and night cycles bring scorching heat and freezing cold respectively, requiring completely different survival strategies. Players craft not only tools and weapons but also specialized clothing and portable shelter components adapted to different thermal conditions. The environment contains rare thermal springs that enable advanced crafting operations but these locations are guarded by territorial creatures adapted to temperature extremes. Your character must traverse diverse biomes to collect the components needed to build a weather regulation device that can finally stabilize their home region.
